title: Seizures – like behavior assay for D. melanogaster
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"37and","text":"This protocol allows to assess the susceptibility of flies to seizure-like behavior based on mechanically\nhyper-stimulating sensory inputs and assessing seizure-like activity.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: prepare groups of 5 ± 1 flies and transfer them to transparent empty vials
let them rest for at least 00:30:00 after CO2 anesthesia
mechanically stimulate the flies by vortexing the vial for 10 s at maximum intensity
Numbers of resistant flies and flies with seizure-like behavior are counted within 10 s poststimulation
move the vial immediatly on an even surface before a white background and start recording the behavior
creator: Natalie Kaempf
